description: You are a Clinical Systems Analyst planning a network deployment. Measure the network bandwidth consumption of a single OpenICE Multiparameter Monitor and produce a capacity planning report. Your report at /home/ga/Desktop/capacity_plan.txt must include the baseline network activity (RX/TX bytes) over a 10-second idle period, the active network traffic over a 10-second period with a 'Multiparameter Monitor' simulated device adapter running, and the calculated per-device bandwidth in Kbps (Active Rate - Baseline Rate). Include a projection table estimating total bandwidth for 10, 50, and 100 devices. OpenICE Supervisor is already running.
